title: 受け止めます、姫のパワーで！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On her day off, Kawakami Princess is
participating in an event announcing a new TV
series in her favorite franchise.

text_block_list.name: Event MC
text_block_list.text:
Here to show her support for the new Princess
Fighter series, today we're joined by Kawakami
Princess!

text_block_list.name: Event MC
text_block_list.text:
So, Kawakami Princess, is it true that you were
inspired by Princess Fighter to enter the world of
racing?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I wanted to be beautiful, graceful, and
courageous, just like the princess in Princess
Fighter. ♪

text_block_list.name: Event MC
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, could you tell us a little about
your daily routine?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Certainly. Just like any princess, I start every day
with a cup of morning tea.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And in the evening, after a long day of training, I
relax by taking a rose petal bath. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's just like they say in Princess Fighter: "A
princess must continue to refine herself every
day!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess doesn't seem nervous at all
and is handling her TV appearance with aplomb.
But all of a sudden...

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, what's that truck doing? Doesn't it look
dangerous?!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text: Eeek! Watch out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear a commotion coming from the roadside.
When I look over, I see a large truck swerving
wildly towards the sidewalk.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'll take care of this!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Everyone get back! I'll catch up to it in no time!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Urrraaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You! Sleepyhead! Wake up and pull yourself
together!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm sorry I had to interrupt our discussion
like that. ♪

text_block_list.name: Event MC
text_block_list.text:
Th-that was incredible, Kawakami Princess! What
tremendous acceleration!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you very much! As you can see, living
a princess lifestyle does wonders for my physical
abilities! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
For my morning tea, I do strength training by
drinking from a giant, steel tea cup! And at night,
I do 300 squats before I take my rose petal bath!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess hones her body! A princess has
powerful legs! These are the things I learned from
Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text:
She's the real thing... She's Princess Fighter in the
flesh!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Wow, she's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Woman B
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! Tell us more! What other training do
you do?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Event MC
text_block_list.text:
A-all right, everyone, please calm down! Don't
push the people ahead of you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Uwahh?! Everyone is so worked up! I've got kind
of a bad feeling about this...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-what should I do, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Stay composed and try to calm the situation
down like a princess would.

This is just another problem to be solved with
princess power!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I-I understand! Stay composed... Act like a
princess...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
E-everyone? Could you please mind your
behavior a little m—

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! HEEEY! I'm telling you to be quiet! Listen!
To! What! I'm! Saying!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: WOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes quite some time for the excitement
coursing through the venue to settle. From this
day forward, Kawakami Princess's fans grow even
more passionate!

text_block_list.name: Event MC
text_block_list.text: S-solve it with princess power? But... how?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It's just like they say in Princess Fighter: "A
princess must always be full of spirit!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With those words, Kawakami Princess walks over
to the grand piano prepared at the side of the
stage, and stands imposingly in front of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: DUN-DUUUUN!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
EVERYONE! Please quiet down! You're causing an
inconvenience to those around you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The force in her voice appears to stun the crowd,
and the commotion suddenly subsides!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You should mind your manners while in the
presence of a princess! Promise me you'll do that,
both for me and for Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Kawakami Princess's scolding of the
crowd, the rest of the event concludes without a
hitch.
